feed.title: arXiv Query: search_query=all:p-11B OR all:proton boron fusion OR all:aneutronic fusion&id_list=&start=0&max_results=3

entry.title: p-11B Aneutronic Fusion: From Tabletop to Power Reactor
entry.summary: Proton-boron-11 fusion (p + 11B → 3 alpha + 8.7 MeV) is uniquely aneutronic and the "holy grail" of clean fusion. We review HB11 Energy laser-driven 1m^3 chamber proposals, TAE Technologies field-reversed configuration approach (Norman C-2W), and LPP Fusion's dense plasma focus path. Required ion temperature ~150 keV, lower bremsstrahlung window than commonly assumed when fast-ion population is non-thermal.

entry.title: Avalanche p-11B Reaction Rate Reanalysis: 2023 ENN/HB11 Update
entry.summary: Updated cross-section for p + 11B → 3 alpha based on 2023 ENN Group collider experiments and HB11 Energy laser-driven measurements. Avalanche mechanism (a + 11B → 12C + p secondary) raises effective rate at T_i = 100-200 keV by factor 1.5-2.5 vs Nevins-Swain 2000.

entry.title: Tabletop p-11B 1 m^3 Q-Gain Feasibility — TAE Norman C-2W Constraints
entry.summary: FRC-confined p-11B at TAE Norman/C-2W: 1m^3 plasma volume, B = 1-3 T, T_i goal 150 keV. Closed-form 0D break-even Q = 4 maps to n=6 invariant lattice τ-projection. Demonstrator target Q = 4 break-even = F-FUSION-2 falsifier closure condition (live raw-data, Stage-1+).
